purpose: Safe demo inputs for the Foresight deployed UI live walkthrough. These values are labels and ranges only, not real advertiser or campaign data.

scenarios.name: Baseline forecast card

inputs.target_industry: demo/general industry option visible in UI
inputs.campaign_objective: 트래픽 or 인지도 option visible in UI

expected_ui: At least one KPI card such as 예상 도달 or 예상 CPM is visible
이번 예측의 기준 확인 panel shows 기간 예산, 예측 방식, 데이터 근거, 구간 상태
내보내기 준비 중 remains disabled or gated

scenarios.name: Benchmark basis review

inputs.target_industry: demo industry with available benchmark data if visible

click_path: Select a safe demo industry if available
Click 시뮬레이션 시작 or 다시 시뮬레이션
Open or scroll to 이번 예측의 기준 확인
Review 예상 범위 and 데이터 충분성 판정
expected_ui: Forecast is framed as 기준선, 예상 범위, 검토 근거, or 데이터 충분성
If data is insufficient, UI shows limited/hold wording rather than a confident claim
No guarantee or optimal-budget wording appears

scenarios.name: Budget range and reach curve review
scenarios.recommended_for: appendix or live explanation after main card
click_path: Check the curve and range table if available
Explain it as estimated review range, not a guaranteed budget recommendation
expected_ui: 예산별 도달 곡선 section is visible or shows a clear waiting/limited state
Range rows are positioned as review signals
No raw campaign rows or advertiser-specific IDs are displayed

do_not_use: token, API key, cookie, session value, or webhook URL
